title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as Holiday Season Boosts Retail Sales
text: The holiday season is helping the struggling retail sector by boosting sales, which is likely to benefit stocks like Urban Outfitters, Inc. (URBN), Citi Trends, Inc. (CTRN), Ross Stores, Inc. (ROST) and Chico's FAS, Inc. (CHS).

title: Should You Ring the Register on This Bargain-Bin Retail Stock?
text: This off-price apparel retailer crushed the market in 2022.

title: As clothing shoppers get pickier, Goldman Sachs likes these retailers' odds for 2023
text: Shoppers are getting choosier and the rush to refresh wardrobes is slowing, Goldman Sachs analysts say, leading to what is likely to be an uneven 2023 that will favor retailers with existing relevance, easier comparisons and tighter inventories.

title: E-Commerce Powering Retail Rebound: 5 Solid Stocks to Buy
text: E-commerce has been playing a major role in driving retail sales, which is helping stocks like Vera Bradley, Inc. (VRA), Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA), Urban Outfitters, Inc. (URBN), Ross Stores, Inc. (ROST) and Five Below, Inc. (FIVE).

title: Holiday Season Sales Aiding Retail Sector Rebound: 5 Winners
text: The holiday season is helping the struggling retail sector by boosting sales. This is likely to benefit stocks like Chico's FAS, Inc. (CHS), Citi Trends, Inc. (CTRN), Urban Outfitters, Inc. (URBN), PC Connection, Inc. (CNXN) and Ross Stores, Inc. (ROST).
